text:
Background

Software developer based in Quezon City, Philippines. ~1 year professional experience.

Primary stack: Laravel, Vue.js, and Inertia.js. Also worked with ASP.NET WebForms (VB.NET) and Microsoft SQL Server.

Experience includes building business systems, internal tools, learning management systems, portfolio websites, and custom web applications.

Current focus

Freelance work alongside full-time employment.

Currently focused on modern web development using Laravel, Vue.js, Next.js, and AI-assisted workflows. Built and deployed a personal Next.js 14 portfolio hosted on AWS EC2.

Interested in software engineering, system design, automation, and building practical solutions for businesses and organizations.

Overview

Enterprise accounting and business management system developed using Laravel, Vue.js, and Microsoft SQL Server.

Implemented and customized for multiple companies across different industries, supporting daily accounting operations, financial reporting, inventory management, purchasing, sales, and administrative workflows.

Key features

General ledger management. Accounts receivable and accounts payable. Sales and purchasing workflows. Inventory tracking and stock movement monitoring. Financial reporting and business analytics. User permissions and role-based access control. Multi-company support and configurable business processes.

Responsibilities

Developed new features, maintained existing modules, fixed production issues, implemented client-specific customizations, and supported system deployments.

Worked directly with databases, business logic, reporting requirements, and user workflow improvements.

Technical experience gained

Large-scale Laravel application architecture. Vue.js frontend development. Microsoft SQL Server database management. Stored procedures and query optimization. Production troubleshooting and maintenance. Client requirement analysis and implementation.

Infrastructure and deployment

Participated in application deployment, server configuration, environment setup, production support, and ongoing system maintenance. Gained hands-on experience with software delivery, deployment workflows, and operational support.

Overview

Full-featured Laravel + Vue + Inertia.js enrollment and LMS platform built speculatively for a civil engineering board exam review center.

Designed to handle the complete student lifecycle from enrollment and payment verification to content delivery and progress monitoring.

Key features

HLS video transcoding with AES-128 encryption, Cloudflare R2 storage. Installment payment tracking with admin approval workflow. GitHub-contribution-style reporting dashboard (Recharts + shadcn/ui). Batch management with automatic role revocation on batch closure. Discord-style announcement system with emoji reactions. Enrollment email notifications via Resend. Stepped multi-page enrollment form.

Role-based access control for administrators, staff, and students. Student enrollment management, payment monitoring, learning content delivery, and administrative reporting.

Technical challenges solved

FFmpeg transcoding failures on 8GB video files (URL encoding, disk space on Windows/Laragon). Inertia.js reactive state bugs (local ref vs computed from page props).

Designed permissions architecture, enrollment workflows, payment approval processes, and reporting features to support real-world operational requirements.

Technologies

Laravel, Vue.js, Inertia.js, MySQL, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Recharts, FFmpeg, Cloudflare R2, Resend, and AWS-compatible object storage.

Overview

Next.js 14 personal portfolio (petermadrid-dev) designed to showcase projects, skills, and professional experience. Includes a GitHub contribution graph component built using the GitHub GraphQL API.

AI Portfolio Assistant

The portfolio includes an AI-powered assistant that acts as Peter Madrid's digital secretary.

Built using:

* Next.js 14
* Google Gemini API
* Gemini Embeddings
* Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
* Markdown-based knowledge base

Features:

* Answers questions about Peter's projects, skills, experience, and services
* Retrieves information from a curated knowledge base rather than relying on general knowledge
* Uses semantic search and cosine similarity to find relevant information
* Refuses to invent information when an answer is not available
* Can explain the technologies and architecture used to build the assistant itself

Technical Highlights

* Server-side API routes using Next.js App Router
* Semantic search powered by vector embeddings
* Knowledge base indexing and retrieval pipeline
* Context-grounded AI responses
* Production deployment on AWS infrastructure

Deployment

Hosted on AWS EC2 running Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.

Infrastructure:

* Nginx reverse proxy
* PM2 process management
* SSL via sslip.io
* Automated Git-based deployment workflow

Freelance services offered

Full-stack Laravel/Vue/Inertia web applications. Learning management systems (LMS) and enrollment platforms. Payment tracking systems with admin approval workflows. Video hosting with encrypted HLS streaming. Custom admin dashboards and reporting.

Business systems, internal tools, client portals, content management systems, and database-driven web applications.

Technologies

Laravel, Vue.js, Inertia.js, Microsoft SQL Server, MySQL, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and REST API integrations.

Engagement model

Project-based freelance, scoped after a requirements discussion. Pricing negotiated per project.

Backend

Laravel (controllers, services, form requests, Eloquent), permissions architecture (roles/permissions/pivot), multi-currency FX handling, BIR-compliant accounting logic, REST API development, authentication and authorization, file uploads, and server-side validation.

Frontend

Vue.js, Inertia.js, TypeScript, Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Recharts, responsive UI development, form handling, and data visualization.

Infra

AWS EC2 deployment, Nginx reverse proxy, PM2 process management, sslip.io for HTTPS without a domain, Cloudflare R2 for object storage, HLS video transcoding with FFmpeg + AES-128 encryption, Linux server administration, and Git-based deployment workflows.

Database

MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, database design, relational data modeling, query optimization, migrations, and HeidiSQL for inspection.

Additional

Git, GitHub, API integrations, GraphQL consumption, Agile team collaboration, technical documentation, and software troubleshooting.
